result.stdout:
Description:
  BlazorLore Scaffold CLI - Generate and refactor Blazor components with ease

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  component <name>  Generate a new Blazor component
  form              Generate forms from models
  service <name>    Generate a new service class
  refactor <file>   Refactor existing Blazor components
  init-templates    Initialize custom templates in the current project
  list-templates    List all available templates

commands.payload:
Description:
  BlazorLore Scaffold CLI - Generate and refactor Blazor components with ease

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  component <name>  Generate a new Blazor component
  form              Generate forms from models
  service <name>    Generate a new service class
  refactor <file>   Refactor existing Blazor components
  init-templates    Initialize custom templates in the current project
  list-templates    List all available templates

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a new Blazor component

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli component <name> [options]

Arguments:
  <name>  The name of the component

Options:
  -o, --output <output>      Output directory for the generated component [default: .]
  -c, --code-behind          Generate with code-behind file [default: False]
  -s, --css                  Generate with CSS file [default: False]
  -t, --template <template>  Use a custom template
  -v, --vars <vars>          Custom variables for template (format: key=value,key2=value2)
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

  -t, --template <template>  Use a custom template

  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

Description:
  Generate forms from models

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli form [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <model>  Generate a form from a model

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate forms from models

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli form [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <model>  Generate a form from a model

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a form from a model

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli form generate <model> [options]

Arguments:
  <model>  The model file to generate form from

Options:
  --name <name>                    The name of the form component (defaults to {Model}Form)
  --path <path>                    The output path for the form [default: ./]
  --edit                           Generate as edit form with existing data [default: False]
  --submit-action <submit-action>  The method name for form submission [default: OnSubmit]
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate a form from a model

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli form generate <model> [options]

Arguments:
  <model>  The model file to generate form from

Options:
  --name <name>                    The name of the form component (defaults to {Model}Form)
  --path <path>                    The output path for the form [default: ./]
  --edit                           Generate as edit form with existing data [default: False]
  --submit-action <submit-action>  The method name for form submission [default: OnSubmit]
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize custom templates in the current project

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli init-templates [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>  Path where templates will be initialized [default: .blazor-templates]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  List all available templates

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli list-templates [options]

Options:
  -c, --category <category>  Filter templates by category (component, form, service)
  --custom-only              Show only custom templates [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Refactor existing Blazor components

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli refactor <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  The component file to refactor

Options:
  -e, --extract-code  Extract @code block to code-behind file [default: False]
  -m, --modernize     Modernize code-behind to use constructor injection [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help      Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Refactor existing Blazor components

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli refactor <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  The component file to refactor

Options:
  -e, --extract-code  Extract @code block to code-behind file [default: False]
  -m, --modernize     Modernize code-behind to use constructor injection [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help      Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a new service class

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli service <name> [options]

Arguments:
  <name>  The name of the service (e.g., UserService)

Options:
  -o, --output <output>              Output directory for the generated service [default: .]
  -i, --interface                    Generate an interface for the service [default: True]
  -r, --repository                   Generate a repository pattern service with CRUD operations [default: False]
  -e, --entity <entity>              Entity name for repository pattern (e.g., User)
  -t, --id-type <id-type>            Entity ID type for repository pattern (int, Guid, string, etc.) [default: int]
  -d, --dependencies <dependencies>  Additional constructor dependencies (format: Type:parameterName)
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate a new service class

Usage:
  BlazorLore.Scaffold.Cli service <name> [options]

Arguments:
  <name>  The name of the service (e.g., UserService)

Options:
  -o, --output <output>              Output directory for the generated service [default: .]
  -i, --interface                    Generate an interface for the service [default: True]
  -r, --repository                   Generate a repository pattern service with CRUD operations [default: False]
  -e, --entity <entity>              Entity name for repository pattern (e.g., User)
  -t, --id-type <id-type>            Entity ID type for repository pattern (int, Guid, string, etc.) [default: int]
  -d, --dependencies <dependencies>  Additional constructor dependencies (format: Type:parameterName)
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information
